judge_result.short_rationale: It correctly says to remove contaminated clothing and wash the skin, but it misses the required immediate action to call poison control or a doctor for treatment advice. It also adds unsupported eye-exposure instructions and an unsupported ointment/oil warning for a skin-exposure scenario, and replaces the required call with 'go to hospital,' which is not the source-backed escalation.
